content:
### Task 15: Update existing tests + add new tests

## Task Ordering & Dependencies

```
Task 1 (MemoryType::ALL)
    ↓
Task 2 (struct fields)
    ↓
Task 3 (open) + Task 4 (index_entry) + Task 11 (migration)
    ↓
Task 5 (search) + Task 6 (search_by_type)
    ↓
Task 7 (trait extension)
    ↓
Task 8 (rebuild) + Task 9 (flush)
    ↓
Task 12 (config)
    ↓
Task 13 (MultiChannelSearcher) + Task 14 (registry)
    ↓
Task 15 (tests)
```


## Files Changed

| File | Change Type | Lines Changed (est.) |
|------|-------------|---------------------|
| `crates/corvia-common/src/types.rs` | Minor | ~5 |
| `crates/corvia-common/src/config.rs` | Moderate | ~40 |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/lite_store.rs` | Major | ~200 |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/traits.rs` | Minor | ~15 |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/pipeline/searcher.rs` | Major | ~150 |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/pipeline/registry.rs` | Moderate | ~30 |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/pipeline/mod.rs` | None | 0 |
| `crates/corvia-kernel/src/ops.rs` | None | 0 (delegates to rebuild_from_files) |
